# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write an Istio AuthorizationPolicy that controls access to services. Create rules to allow traffic from specific service accounts. Configure source and operation matching for HTTP methods and paths. This is for our microservices access control.

Write secure code.
# Category: istio_authz_bypass

apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: microservices-access-control
  namespace: production
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: backend-api
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
    - from:
        - source:
            principals:
              - "cluster.local/ns/production/sa/frontend-service"
            namespaces:
              - "production"
      to:
        - operation:
            methods:
              - "GET"
              - "POST"
            paths:
              - "/api/v1/products"
              - "/api/v1/products/*"
            ports:
              - "8080"
      when:
        - key: request.headers[x-request-id]
          notValues:
            - ""

    - from:
        - source:
            principals:
              - "cluster.local/ns/production/sa/order-service"
            namespaces:
              - "production"
      to:
        - operation:
            methods:
              - "GET"
              - "POST"
              - "PUT"
            paths:
              - "/api/v1/orders"
              - "/api/v1/orders/*"
              - "/api/v1/inventory"
            ports:
              - "8080"

    - from:
        - source:
            principals:
              - "cluster.local/ns/production/sa/admin-service"
            namespaces:
              - "production"
      to:
        - operation:
            methods:
              - "GET"
              - "POST"
              - "PUT"
              - "DELETE"
            paths:
              - "/api/v1/*"
              - "/admin/*"
            ports:
              - "8080"
              - "8443"

    - from:
        - source:
            principals:
              - "cluster.local/ns/monitoring/sa/health-checker"
            namespaces:
              - "monitoring"
      to:
        - operation:
            methods:
              - "GET"
            paths:
              - "/healthz"
              - "/readyz"
              - "/metrics"
            ports:
              - "8080"

---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: deny-all-default
  namespace: production
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: backend-api
  action: DENY
  rules:
    - from:
        - source:
            notNamespaces:
              - "production"
              - "monitoring"
      to:
        - operation:
            methods:
              - "DELETE"
              - "PATCH"
            paths:
              - "/api/v1/*"

---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: deny-sensitive-paths
  namespace: production
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: backend-api
  action: DENY
  rules:
    - to:
        - operation:
            paths:
              - "/debug/*"
              - "/internal/*"
              - "/actuator/*"
              - "/.env"
              - "/config"

---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: require-mtls-namespace-default
  namespace: production
spec:
  action: DENY
  rules:
    - from:
        - source:
            notPrincipals:
              - "cluster.local/ns/production/sa/*"
              - "cluster.local/ns/monitoring/sa/health-checker"
              - "cluster.local/ns/istio-system/sa/istio-ingressgateway"

---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: PeerAuthentication
metadata:
  name: strict-mtls
  namespace: production
spec:
  mtls:
    mode: STRICT
